title: Choose the custom song gift that fits your moment
description: Preview your personalized song for free, then unlock the full track and optional gift extras when you are ready.

hero.badge: Flexible plans for every kind of gift
hero.titleLine2: Pay only for what you love
hero.description: Start with a one-time song for a single unforgettable moment, or unlock Pro for recurring downloads, premium video styles, and more room to create keepsakes people actually replay.

promotion.title: Limited-Time
promotion.lead: Claim these premium add-ons with any plan before this offer ends.
promotion.description: Pro & Platinum already include monthly perks. This bonus is for everyone else too, so you can unlock extra keepsakes at checkout while the promotion is live.
promotion.interactiveHint: Hover to preview and open the studio

video.title: Cinematic Music Video
video.description: Transform your custom song into a visual story with your own memories.

wallArt.title: Digital Lyrics Wall Art
wallArt.description: A high-resolution design of your custom song lyrics, ready to download, print, and frame.

mp3.title: Studio-Quality MP3
mp3.description: Download your custom song in high quality, keep it offline, and play it on any device.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.description: Safe and instant verification via Creem

satisfaction.title: 100% Satisfaction
satisfaction.description: Tweak your track for free until you are completely satisfied.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: We are here if you need a hand along the way.

single.title: Single Song
single.description: One song, one occasion, no subscription.
features: Personalised lyrics crafted for your occasion

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Monthly songs and video gifts, studio quality.
features: Personalised lyrics crafted for your occasion

platinum.title: Platinum
platinum.description: Unlimited songs and videos. Everything in Pro, and more.
features: Personalised lyrics crafted for your occasion
